data.body: DONE (commit ee29e91a). Ported exists/resolve/format to rebar._engine_support.lookups, routed in-process via _LOOKUPS (full auto-init). Dual-run parity 18 scenarios green (all id forms, all format modes auto/canonical/alias/short/unknown-warn, miss/arity/empty); compacted-ticket SNAPSHOT fallback parity verified live (both return short prefix since alias read from CREATE only). interfaces tier 364 passed. CLI-only. No bash deleted.
